title: Voltage Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Reentrancy attack exploiting ERC677 standard's callAfterTransfer() function

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls doTransferOut() after a borrow() in the same tx

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls doTransferOut() after a borrow() in the same tx
summary: Voltage Finance was exploited via a reentrancy attack on Ola Finance, a Fuse Network Lending-as-a-Service partner, losing around $4M. The attack leveraged the ERC677 standard's callAfterTransfer() function, allowing the attacker to repeatedly withdraw funds.
